title: Pack of 5 Rose Gold Heart Balloons, 18 Inches Heart Shape Foil Balloons, Heart Balloons Helium for Valentines Engagement Bridal Shower Graduation Wedding Anniversary Birthday Party Decorations
features: [Package Includes] - 5pcs 18” Rose gold Heart Foil Balloons + 1 Random Ribbon + 1 Straw
[High Quality] - Our rose gold heart balloons are made of high quality aluminum foil, which is non-toxic and harmless. Besides, our heart balloons helium are thicker and more durable.
[Easy to use] - The love heart balloons can be inflated with air or helium without any skill. And it is self-sealing, which is easy and convenient to decorate your party.

[Romantic Party Decorations] - Rose gold is bright & fashionable enough. The heart shape balloons are matched to other balloons, such as star shaped balloons, that will perfectly decorate your party with a wonderful atmosphere, surprising your loved ones on valentine’s day, engagement, anniversary, wedding or other occasions!

[100% Customer Satisfaction] - If you have any questions or problems for our rose gold heart foil balloons, please feel free to contact with us. Full refund or new replacement will be allowed. Please buy with your confidence!
description: Let ONLYQIQIU heart balloons help you decorate a wonderful party! Party Balloons Pack 5pcs 18” Rose gold Foil Heart Balloons 1pcs Random Ribbon 1pc Straw Perfect Party Decorations Rose gold is bright & fashionable enough. These rose gold heart balloons are good choice for valentine’s day, engagement, anniversary, wedding, bridal shower, birthday parties, baby showers, graduation ceremonies, dates, bachelor parties, New Years, prom or other occasions. Warm Reminder Please don't over-inflate the rose gold heart balloons, 80%-90% is Ok. Please avoid exposing the rose gold heart foil balloons to direct sunlight, sharp objects and excessive friction, otherwise they will burst. 100% Customer Satisfaction If you have any questions or problems for our rose gold foil heart balloons, please feel free to contact with us.
